title: delphinium handelianum
intro: Delphinium handelianum, also known as Handel's delphinium, is a perennial flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that aid in wound healing and reducing fever. The health benefits of Delphinium handelianum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce pain and inflammation, and act as an antiseptic agent, making it beneficial for skin conditions and infections. Delphinium handelianum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and risks.
